target: 5 user-reported issues in Testmaster English learning platform
summary: ALL 5 BUG FIXES VERIFIED. Text sizes increased for interactive board, vocab games limited to 2, grammar games has 3 types, Error Hunter punctuation logic fixed, Speaking section shows 3 prompts.

BUG_FIX_1_TEXT_SIZES_INCREASED.description: Text sizes increased in lesson pages for interactive board use
BUG_FIX_1_TEXT_SIZES_INCREASED.evidence: Warmup h3=24px (text-2xl), options=18px (text-lg), Reading passage=20px (text-xl), Grammar=20px (text-xl)

BUG_FIX_2_VOCAB_GAMES_2_MAX.description: Vocab games shows exactly 2 games (reduced from 3)
BUG_FIX_2_VOCAB_GAMES_2_MAX.evidence: Badge shows 'Game 1 of 2' in VocabGamesPlayer - games.slice(0, 2) in line 563

BUG_FIX_3_GRAMMAR_GAMES_3_TYPES.description: Grammar games has 3 different game types (word_order, fill_blank, error_hunter)
BUG_FIX_3_GRAMMAR_GAMES_3_TYPES.evidence: Badge shows 'Grammar Game 1 of 3' with Word Order visible - imports WordOrder, FillTheBlank, ErrorHunter

BUG_FIX_4_ERROR_HUNTER_PUNCTUATION.description: Error Hunter correctly identifies words with punctuation errors
BUG_FIX_4_ERROR_HUNTER_PUNCTUATION.evidence: ErrorHunter.js lines 34-46 handle punctuation: exact match, clean match (stripped punctuation), word contains error punctuation, clicked word IS word with wrong punctuation

BUG_FIX_5_SPEAKING_3_PROMPTS.description: Speaking/Production section shows 3 separate prompts with navigation
BUG_FIX_5_SPEAKING_3_PROMPTS.evidence: Speaking activity shows '1/3' counter indicating 3 prompts

LESSON_FLOW_ACCESSIBLE.description: Full lesson flow accessible in order: Warmup → Vocabulary → Vocab Games → Reading → Grammar → Grammar Games → Listening → Speaking → Exit Quiz
LESSON_FLOW_ACCESSIBLE.evidence: Successfully navigated through all activities via sidebar clicks and skip buttons

critical_code_review_comments: VocabGamesPlayer.js line 563: games.slice(0, 2) correctly limits to 2 games
GrammarGamesPlayer renders 3 game types: WordOrder, FillTheBlank, ErrorHunter
ErrorHunter punctuation logic handles edge cases (punctuation at end, punctuation-only errorWord)
Text sizes use Tailwind text-xl, text-2xl, text-lg consistently for readability
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing lesson stage_2_unit_01_lesson_01
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 56 verified all 5 bug fixes for Testmaster platform: (1) Text sizes increased with text-2xl for headings, text-lg for options, text-xl for passages (2) Vocab games limited to 2 games via slice(0,2) (3) Grammar games has 3 types - WordOrder, FillTheBlank, ErrorHunter (4) ErrorHunter handles punctuation via multiple comparison methods (5) Speaking shows 3 prompts with 1/3 counter. Test lesson URL: /unified/lesson/stage_2_unit_01_lesson_01
